attacking_style: Not a natural attacker; relies on positioning discipline and tactical craft in final kilometers rather than explosive accelerations. Most effective on steep summit finishes where positioning and cornering technique matter more than pure power.
team_tactics: Movistar sets tempo through domestiques but Mas struggles to capitalize on team-created advantages. Team occasionally prioritizes his stage opportunities (sprint finishes, bonus seconds) over conservative GC defense.
terrain_preference: Steep summit finishes where race craft and positioning trump raw explosiveness. Technical final kilometers with corners favor his tactical maturity. Exposed on climbs requiring sustained acceleration responses.
vulnerability: Cannot follow or match explosive accelerations from pure climbers like Roglic. Collapses when forced to respond repeatedly to high-intensity surges in final kilometers, losing significant time (2:43 observed).
key_patterns: Excels through positioning and tactical intelligence rather than raw climbing power (3 instances)
Consistently struggles to match explosive accelerations from top-tier climbers like Roglic (3 instances)
Shows superior race craft versus faster finishers in technical conclusions (2 instances)
Team tempo-setting doesn't guarantee ability to follow when race intensifies (2 instances)
Competes for bonus seconds and stage placings even as GC rider (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 shows continued tactical sharpness (sprint for 5th) but no evidence of improved ability to match explosive climbers that has plagued him since 2020-2022
